Class DefaultBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<Object>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder.DefaultBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYParserVisitor<Object>, ParseTreeVisitor<Object>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeclarationBuilder, ExpressionBuilder, FunctionPredicateBuilder
public class DefaultBuilder extends KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>
Helper class for are visitor that requires a namespaces and services. Also it provides the evaluation of some basic ParserRuleContexts. This builder provides lookup functions for the namespace set and also namespace for SchemaVariable. But it does not evaluate schemaVariables, or other declarations.

    • visitPvset

      public List<String> visitPvset(KeYParser.PvsetContext ctx)
      Description copied from class: KeYParserBaseVisitor
      Visit a parse tree produced by KeYParser.pvset().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(RuleNode) on ctx.

      Specified by:
      visitPvset in interface KeYParserVisitor<Object>
      Overrides:
      visitPvset in class KeYParserBaseVisitor<Object>
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree
      Returns:
      the visitor result

    • toArraySort

      public Sort toArraySort(Pair<Sort,Type> p, int numOfDimensions)

    • lookupSort

      protected Sort lookupSort(String name)
      looks up and returns the sort of the given name or null if none has been found. If the sort is not found for the first time, the name is expanded with "java.lang." and the look up restarts
